name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream the margarine and sugars with the egg and vanilla in a large bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and creamy.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, beating at low speed until blended.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
6. Drop heaping spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 9-12 minutes, or until light golden.
8. Makes about 36 cookies.
